# HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-Abstractions` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Kind: `interface`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../concepts/learners-models-and-parameters.md)

A function (DataHandle, Model?) -&gt; Model that learns parameters from data.

The Learner does NOT own inference state. If inference requires mutable state (sliding windows, KV cache), that belongs to a ScanTransform or GeneratorTransform. Discovery uses C# 14 extension members.

public interface ILearner
```

```

Observable training progress. Subscribe before calling Fit/FitAsync.
